analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet welcomes China Development Bank’s debt deferral agreement with Zambia and claims it shows Chinese institutions are actively helping resolve African debt issues. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned; no critique of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—portrays China/Chinese institutions as cooperatively assisting African countries with debt relief, highlighting constructive, supportive international behavior. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; focus is international role. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No direct claim about domestic governance or technological/economic leadership; focus is external assistance. CH6 (culture/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH2 applies.
